# Boxx Commercial Finance

> A whole-of-market UK commercial finance broker. Boxx arranges bridging loans, commercial mortgages, development finance, asset finance, invoice finance and working capital for UK businesses, homeowners, landlords, property investors and developers.

Boxx Commercial Finance is a **broker, not a lender**. We compare lenders across the whole of the UK market and arrange the funding, rather than lending our own money. Nothing on the site is a quote or an offer of finance; actual terms depend on the borrower, the security and the lender.

Bridging loans are our primary specialism. They are used by homeowners (chain breaks, auction purchases, buying before selling) as well as by landlords, investors and developers (refurbishment, conversion, development exit, capital raising) — not only by businesses.

- Website: https://boxxfinance.co.uk
- Phone: 0330 043 1612
- Email: hello@boxxfinance.co.uk
- Enquiries: https://boxxfinance.co.uk/chat-about-funding

## Funding solutions

- [Asset Finance](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/funding-solutions/asset-finance): Acquire essential equipment and machinery without restricting your working capital. Spread the cost over the asset's useful life and preserve cash flow for…
- [Structured Finance](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/funding-solutions/structured-finance): Complex funding solutions for business acquisitions, buyouts and restructuring. Layered debt and equity structured for major transactions by experienced…
- [Invoice Finance](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/funding-solutions/invoice-finance): Release up to 90% of your invoice value immediately. Improve cash flow without taking on long-term debt — ideal for businesses with extended customer payment…
- [Business Loans](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/funding-solutions/business-loans): Flexible secured and unsecured business loans for growth, acquisitions or working capital. Structured around your trading performance with multiple UK lenders.
- [Commercial Mortgages](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/funding-solutions/commercial-mortgages): Purchase or refinance trading premises or investment property. Long-term commercial mortgage funding structured to preserve your capital and support your…
- [Asset Refinance](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/funding-solutions/asset-refinance): Unlock capital tied up in your existing assets. Release equity from owned vehicles and machinery to boost working capital without selling core business…
- [Merchant Cash Advance](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/funding-solutions/merchant-cash-advance): Flexible business funding that repays in line with your card sales. Ideal for retail and hospitality businesses needing fast access to working capital.
- [Trade Finance](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/funding-solutions/trade-finance): Bridge the gap between supplier orders and customer payments. Fund your supply chain, support imports and trade internationally with confidence.
- [Tax & VAT Funding](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/funding-solutions/tax-vat-funding): Spread the cost of VAT and Corporation Tax over manageable monthly instalments. Protect your working capital from large HMRC payments.
- [Working Capital](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/funding-solutions/working-capital): Boost liquidity to cover operational costs, stock purchases or seasonal cash flow gaps. Flexible working capital facilities designed for UK businesses.
- [Bridging Loans](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/funding-solutions/bridging-loans): Fast, short-term bridging loans for homeowners, landlords and property investors — auction purchases, refurbishments and chain breaks. Speed and certainty when…
- [Development Finance](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/funding-solutions/development-finance): Funding for ground-up builds, conversions and major refurbishments. Staged drawdown releases aligned with your project milestones.

## Data

- [UK SME Funding Index](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/uk-sme-funding-index): Effective interest rate on new loans to UK SMEs: 6.18% as of May 2026, sourced directly from the Bank of England (series CFMZ6LD). Updated automatically; every figure is traceable to a Bank of England series code.

## Locations

Boxx publishes 195 location guides covering local UK finance markets — lender appetite, typical deal types and regional factors. 146 of these cover bridging loans, following the pattern https://boxxfinance.co.uk/locations/bridging-loans-{town}. The remaining 49 cover other funding types (for example business loans, development finance, invoice finance and commercial mortgages).

- [Bridging Loans London](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/locations/bridging-loans-london)
- [Bridging Loans Birmingham](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/locations/bridging-loans-birmingham)
- [Bridging Loans Norwich](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/locations/bridging-loans-norwich)
- [Bridging Loans Reading](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/locations/bridging-loans-reading)
- [Bridging Loans City of London | Commercial Finance Broker](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/locations/bridging-loans-city-of-london)
- [Bridging Loans Canary Wharf | Commercial Finance Broker](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/locations/bridging-loans-canary-wharf)
- [Bridging Loans Mayfair | Commercial Finance Broker](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/locations/bridging-loans-mayfair)
- [Bridging Loans Chelsea | Commercial Finance Broker](https://boxxfinance.co.uk/locations/bridging-loans-chelsea)
